title: ZARA Sweater — Black
image_captions: Black ribbed knit sweater with ZARA neck tag reading 'ZARA' and size 'S'. Front view showing crew neckline.
Black ribbed knit sweater with ZARA neck tag reading 'ZARA' and size 'S'. Front view showing crew neckline.
Neck tag reading ZARA Size EUR M USA M MEX 28 MADE IN CHINA.
Vertical tape measure showing 50cm at the hem edge of a dark grey ribbed knit garment.
Horizontal tape measure showing 50cm at the garment's edge.
Care label showing 41% polyester, 38% acrylic, 15% nylon (so p/o Brasil poliamida), and 6% wool.
Back view showing black ribbed knit sweater with raglan sleeves and crew neck.
enhanced_description:
ZARA Sweater — Black
Brand: ZARA
Size: M (Tag reads S)
Condition: Excellent
Composition: 41% Polyester, 38% Acrylic, 15% Nylon, 6% Wool
Color: Black

About the Piece
A sleek black ribbed knit sweater offering a modern silhouette. Perfect for layering or wearing alone during cooler days. The soft texture and classic crew neck make it an essential wardrobe staple.

Style Note: Minimalist & Chic

Key Detail: Raglan sleeves with a crew neckline design.
